#170 The McDonald's squid burger is delicious

Areas discussed: Taipei, Ximending

January 14, 2026 1 hour 18 minutes Taipei, Taiwan

All transcripts are machine generated.

Wait at the intersection, you dickhead. So anyway, that's the vibe of the traffic around here. Not terrible, but I got to be a lot more alert than usual. I just walked by a sign that said it's a mere 29 degrees right now.

It looks like I'm at a museum. 1:10:00 But the name is not in English, so I don't know what it's called.

I can't see the mountain between some buildings and go like, oh, that's north or that's south because it could be either. I guess I can know it's north or south. But that's good to know. While it was turning. And, you know, traditionally in North America, these beeps only happen when something is backing up. But yeah, now this bus is stopping to turn. It just beeps.
